title: Module Manifest
description: Schema for module manifest.json files. Every module in the /modules directory must have a manifest.json that validates against this schema.

$schema.description: Reference to this schema for IDE autocomplete.

id.description: Unique module identifier. Must match the folder name exactly. Lowercase letters, digits, and hyphens only. 3-40 characters.

name.description: Human-readable module name shown in the hub and sidebar.

description.description: Short description shown on the module card. Keep it to one sentence.

version.description: Semantic version (MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH). Bump when the manifest or endpoint behavior changes.

category.description: Single primary category. Used for faceted filtering in the hub.

tags.description: Freeform tags for search. Lowercase and hyphens only.

icon.description: Filename of the icon, relative to the module folder. Must be an SVG or a square PNG ≥ 96×96.

endpoint.description: HTTPS URL the extension will POST to when the sidebar needs content. Must be HTTPS.

supported_contexts.description: Which sidebar contexts this module supports. The extension only calls the endpoint in these contexts.

privacy_url.description: Required. Public URL of the module's privacy policy. Shown in the install consent dialog.

support_url.description: URL where users can get help. Can be a docs page, mailto:, or a contact form.

homepage.description: Marketing or landing page for the module.

verified.description: Set only by hub maintainers during review. Do not set in PRs — it will be rejected by CI.
